ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you encounter high CPU usage, you can enable this option to lower the animation FPS to save CPU resources
ast.target: 如果遇到 CPU 占用过高，可以启用此选项降低动画 FPS 以节省 CPU 资源

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Important: Enabling this feature will automatically add a block ID when activating a task, unless a block ID is already present.
ast.target: 重要提示：启用此功能后，在激活任务时将自动添加块 ID，除非已存在块 ID。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The file to log pomodoro sessions to
ast.target: 用于记录番茄钟会话的文件

ast.name: setText
ast.source: plugin to be enabled, then click the refresh button
ast.target: 插件，然后点击刷新按钮
